focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 28、EXT. APPROACH TO BLUE JOHN CANYON. DAY. A VAST ARROYO.
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron meets Kristi and Megan at the trailhead, jokes about his hockey mask, and offers guidance to the Cathedral, which they plan to climb despite navigational challenges.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Hiker meeting and assisting two other hikers
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Meets Kristi and Megan, introduces himself with a handshake and joke about his hockey mask, and offers guidance to the Cathedral climb
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Help Kristi and Megan locate the Cathedral for climbing
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Aron, Kristi, and Megan are together, laughing and planning to climb the Cathedral
evidence_quotes: He slides/surfs down so he's on the same level as them, arriving in a haze of dust, holding out his hand for the shake. Big smile.
ARON Nice to meet you. What a day.
ARON Let me guess... You're here for the paintings or the Cathedral?
ARON The climb's a little tricky but it's worth it.

relation_updates: Established friendly relations with Kristi and Megan
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Friendly and helpful in initial encounter

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 38、EXT. CONJUNCTION OF BLUE JOHN CANYON, WEST FORK, EAST FORK.
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron invites Megan and Kristi to a party near a large inflatable Scooby Doo on the east road, about 2 miles down a track, promising three cold beers; they agree, but he declines hiking out with them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Solo climber at a path fork
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Parts ways with Megan and Kristi at the fork to continue alone towards the Big Drop Rappel
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Proceed to the Big Drop Rappel
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Continues alone on the path after parting ways
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether he will reach the Big Drop Rappel before dark
evidence_quotes: They come to a clear fork in the paths.
ARON Why don't you come with me to the Big Drop Rappel?
MEGAN You'll never get out before dark.
ARON No, I really got to do this.

relation_updates: Invites Megan and Kristi to a party
Parts ways with them at the fork
status_updates: Possesses miner's lamp for night climbing
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Insists on continuing alone despite warnings about darkness

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron is pinned by a rock that traps his hand against the canyon wall, leaving him powerless as the situation abruptly stills.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Right hand and wrist smashed and pinned against canyon wall by boulder.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hand trapped and injured by boulder, immobilized against canyon wall.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to free his trapped hand and survive the injuries.
evidence_quotes: The rock smashes the right hand and wrist against the wall and drags it down the remaining distance.
Like a cheese grater it tears the skin from the back of the hand and the forearm, decorating the wall.

status_updates: Hand trapped and injured by boulder
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Powerless and injured in immediate crisis.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A man finds blood and tissue on the canyon wall from his injury, checks for blood under the boulder, hears cheering on his headphones, turns it off, and calls for help.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Injured survivor examining hand injury and calling for help
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Realizes hand is crushed and dying, then shouts for help
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has called for help while remaining trapped with severe hand injury
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hand is trapped and losing function
evidence_quotes: Its crushed, it's fucking dying man!
He reaches up and touches the trail of blood, hair and skin left on the canyon wall
He switches it off
HELP! HELLO!

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Frustrated but taking action to seek assistance

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron discovers steel filings from a knife, tries blowing them away and digging at a hard wall, then realizes he may need to cut off his arm.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Entrapped survivor assessing rescue options after knife failure
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sees steel filings from knife, tries digging at wall, and states the need to cut off his arm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Acknowledges self-amputation as a necessary measure
evidence_quotes: he can see in the foreground that there's a pile of steel filings from the knife itself
ARON (CONT'D) Fuck. It's hard as iron.
You're gonna have to cut your arm off.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Persistent and pragmatic in survival efforts

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron attempts to free his trapped hand by using a stick to hook and move a knife beneath his feet, illuminated by a headlamp, but initial efforts fail.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Survivor using headlamp and modified stick to retrieve knife
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Modifies stick into hook to lift knife from beneath feet
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hand still trapped, but knife now accessible
evidence_quotes: An enormous overhead light switches on (Aron's headlamp placed above to let him see).
The stick re-enters with the top of it almost broken off, acting like a hook,
the stick hooks through the little ring at the end of the knife. It lifts.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron, stranded in BJ Canyon for 70 hours with little water, expresses love to his parents, regrets not appreciating them enough, and reflects on his life as he faces danger.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Trapped survivor recording a video message for his parents
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Expresses love and regret to parents in a video message after 70 hours trapped in the canyon
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Remains trapped in BJ Canyon with minimal water, having recorded an emotional message
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Survival and rescue from the canyon
evidence_quotes: Mom, Dad, I really love you guys.
I haven't appreciated you in my own heart the way I know I could.
I wish I'd returned all of your calls, ever.

relation_updates: Expresses deep emotional connection and regret to parents
status_updates: Stranded for 70 hours with minimal water
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Familial and reflective in his video recording

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron breaks his trapped arm bones with force, rotates the broken limb, and prepares to cut it free with a knife, enduring immense pain in silence.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Survivor breaking trapped arm bones to prepare for amputation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Deliberately breaks arm bones by hammering with a rock and applying force
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To break the arm bones so it can be rotated and cut free
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Arm bones broken and forearm rotatable, ready for cutting with a knife
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Must complete amputation to escape the canyon
evidence_quotes: He takes off his shoe and pulls the sock over his hand to cushion his palm and picks up the black rounded hammer rock again.
Ignoring the pain he starts hammering at the rock surface.
POW Like a gunshot in the canyon, the bone breaks.
He can rotate his forearm like a shaft inside a housing.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: He frees himself, stumbles away in a daze, experiences vivid sensory distortions, and defiantly declares he will not die, as the scene shifts to 3:34 am.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Aron Ralston performing self-amputation to free his trapped arm from the boulder.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: He completes cutting through his arm, frees himself, staggers away in shock, and declares he will not die.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Free from the boulder but in shock, disoriented, and injured.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Finding medical help or reaching safety.
evidence_quotes: his shoulders open and he's free......
He staggers back, one, two, three steps away from his arm...
ARON (spitting out this declaration at the rock) I AM NOT GOING TO DIE.... HERE.
He shudders in shock and drops everything for minutes.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defiant and resilient, as shown by his survival declaration.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron boards a helicopter with white leather seats, contrasting his rugged past; he's welcomed by the pilot as they take off, leaving others behind.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Survivor boarding helicopter for medical evacuation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Aron boards the helicopter, notes the clean seat, and takes off with the pilot's reassurance.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In the helicopter, airborne and leaving the rescue site.
evidence_quotes: Aron looks at the beautiful white leather seat
he gets in the back of the helicopter
ARON I'm gonna make a terrible mess of your seat.
PILOT Just get in buddy. We're all looking for you.

relation_updates: Positive interaction with pilot who reassures him and confirms search efforts
status_updates: Leaving rescue location for medical care
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Grateful and aware of his messy condition

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Aron Ralston's timeline begins with social interactions during canyoneering, but a decision to go solo leads to a life-threatening accident where his hand is trapped by a boulder. Over days of entrapment, he struggles with desperation, considers extreme measures like self-amputation, and ultimately breaks and cuts his own arm to free himself. After escaping, he is rescued by helicopter and begins physical and emotional recovery.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron releases mid-climb, falling into a 60-foot emerald pool below, leaving Kristi shocked as the scene cuts away.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: teasing Aron during the cave climb
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Megan teases Aron by warning him to behave or they'll tell his mother, indicating a familiar and playful interaction.
evidence_quotes: MEGAN (O.S.) You behave Aron Ralston or we'll tell your mother all about where you lure girls...

relation_updates: Teased Aron Ralston with a reference to his mother, indicating a familiar and positive dynamic.
status_updates: Located in the cave dome during the climb.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: playful and familiar with Aron, using teasing language that references his mother

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron jumps into water, unseen but heard; he sings loudly while Kristi strips and moves away, reassuring Megan he's fine.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Megan hears Aron jump into the water and asks if he is okay.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Megan receives reassurance from Kristi and hears Aron singing.
evidence_quotes: explosive crack of man on water
Are you ok? ARON!
Of course he's ok. Listen to him.

relation_updates: Showed concern for Aron Ralston's well-being.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kristi and Megan, in underwear, enter a pool and float together under rippling light; Megan insists they re-film the scene.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Megan tells Kristi they need to re-film the pool scene while they are floating together.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To film the pool sequence again
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Floating in the pool with Kristi after proposing to re-film
evidence_quotes: MEGAN We've got to go again. And film it!

relation_updates: Collaborated with Kristi on deciding to repeat and film the activity.
status_updates: In the pool, floating with Kristi under rippling light.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron demonstrates descending a gulley with technical instructions, emphasizing handholds and slime, while Megan admits confusion; he stresses safety with a boost needed at the bottom.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Megan, positioned at the top of the gulley, struggles to comprehend Aron's technical descending instructions.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Megan verbally admits she does not understand any of Aron's instructions for descending the gulley.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Megan remains high in the gulley, confused about how to proceed with the descent.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to descend safely given her lack of understanding of the instructions.
evidence_quotes: MEGAN I didn't understand any of that.
Megan is way high, Kristi half way.
MEGAN An illegal instructor.

relation_updates: teases Kristi about enjoying physical contact with Aron
status_updates: discloses lack of understanding of climbing safety
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Uncertain about climbing techniques but interacts humorously with Kristi.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 38、EXT. CONJUNCTION OF BLUE JOHN CANYON, WEST FORK, EAST FORK.
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aron invites Megan and Kristi to a party near a large inflatable Scooby Doo on the east road, about 2 miles down a track, promising three cold beers; they agree, but he declines hiking out with them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: hiker accepting a party invitation and voicing safety worries
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Megan agrees to attend Aron's party and expresses concern about his plan to climb at night.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Megan and Kristi part ways with Aron at the trail fork, with a plan to meet at his party.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Aron will safely complete his night climb and if the party will occur as planned.
evidence_quotes: MEGAN You'll never get out before dark.
MEGAN You don't climb at night, do you?
MEGAN cold beers!

relation_updates: agrees to attend party with Aron
shows concern for Aron's night climbing
status_updates: commits to attending a future social event

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Megan's timeline shows her evolving from playful teasing of Aron to expressing concern for his safety, taking initiative to film their experience, admitting confusion during climbing, and accepting social plans with underlying care. She demonstrates familiarity, proactivity, and sociability throughout these interactions. Her developments are grounded in specific scenes with Aron and Kristi, highlighting her role as a companion and participant in outdoor activities.
